summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed via useSaveDiagramState with cache invalidation, useGetAllDiagrams with staleTime:0 and refetchOnMount, and proper wiring in AttackPathPage/DiagramSidebar/LoadDiagramDialog. REQ-2 is addressed in AttackPathToolbar where the draggable attribute and onDragStart handler are scoped to the img element only, not the button or label text.
